_publications._publicationTitle: Hybrid Minigene Assay: An Efficient Tool to Characterize mRNA Splicing Profiles of

_contextSnippet: Mutation Taster predicted a splicing alteration...The c.278G > A p.(Cys93Tyr) missense substitution, which was predicted to marginally increase the strength of the donor site by MutationTaster, and was associated with a normal splicing pattern
details: Predicted splicing alteration for c.6882C > G p.(Leu2315=) and marginally increased donor site strength for c.278G > A p.(Cys93Tyr), but minigene assays showed normal splicing patterns for both variants
